objectives: Build core intuition and working knowledge of vectors, matrices, derivatives, and probability needed for modern Machine Learning
Apply key concepts from linear algebra, calculus, probability, and statistics to common learning problems
learning_path.title: Mathematical Foundations for Machine Learning

objectives: Use Python to implement core Machine Learning computations and experiments
Structure code to support iterative experimentation and reproducible results
learning_path.title: Python for Machine Learning Workflows

objectives: Understand gradient-based optimization and how it drives model training
Recognize when convex optimization assumptions apply and how they affect solutions
learning_path.title: Optimization Essentials for Learning Algorithms

objectives: Train baseline Machine Learning models and reason about bias/variance and generalization
Design experiments to compare approaches under controlled conditions
learning_path.title: Core Machine Learning: Models, Training, and Generalization

objectives: Select appropriate evaluation protocols and metrics for reliable comparison
Build benchmarking routines to detect overfitting, leakage, and unstable results
learning_path.title: Model Evaluation & Benchmarking in Practice

objectives: Implement and train neural networks using Pytorch
Connect optimization behavior to Deep Learning training dynamics
learning_path.title: Deep Learning Fundamentals with Pytorch

objectives: Build and evaluate Deep Learning approaches for Natural Language Processing tasks
Design benchmarking experiments for Natural Language Processing models
learning_path.title: Natural Language Processing with Deep Learning

objectives: Train and evaluate Deep Learning models for Computer Vision tasks
Compare model variants using consistent evaluation and benchmarking practices
learning_path.title: Computer Vision with Deep Learning

objectives: Understand core Reinforcement Learning problem formulations and training loops
Design experiments to evaluate Reinforcement Learning agents under controlled settings
learning_path.title: Reinforcement Learning: Foundations and Experiments

objectives: Scale Deep Learning training using Distributed Training & High-Performance Computing (Gpu/Cuda) concepts
Identify bottlenecks and design benchmarking to validate scaling behavior
learning_path.title: Distributed Training & High-Performance Computing (Gpu/Cuda) for Deep Learning

objectives: Apply scientific research methodology to plan, document, and justify empirical studies
Manage research data to support traceability, reuse, and reliable analysis
learning_path.title: Scientific Research Methodology and Research Data Management

objectives: Write research proposals with clear problem statements, methods, evaluation plans, and risk mitigation
Align proposed experiments with appropriate benchmarking and data management plans
learning_path.title: Write Research Proposals for Machine Learning and Deep Learning Projects

matched_occupation.description: Computer scientists conduct research in computer and information science, directed toward greater knowledge and understanding of fundamental aspects of ICT phenomena. They write research reports and proposals. Computer scientists also invent and design new approaches to computing technology, find innovative uses for existing technology and studies and solve complex problems in computing.
matched_occupation.label: computer scientist
